sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f (FG) Kelly sizing recalculated every 63 trading days (quarterly). Position size derived from optimal f via geometric mean. Validation required per Equation 8.01. Fractional Kelly reduces variance vs. full optimal f.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f position sizing adjusted on a quarterly basis, with position size recalculated every 63 trading days to optimize geometric mean growth.
